channel.title: BLAST MODE
channel.description: Welcome to BLAST MODE - powered by DJ BLAST. High-impact DJ mixes blending House, Latin, Afro, Hip-Hop, R&B, and global party energy. From smooth grooves to peak-time pressure, every set is built with intention and real dancefloor momentum. Stay elevated. Join #BLASTMODE. Business Inquiries: bonnechancedigital@gmail.com
channel.itunes:author: DJ Blast
channel.itunes:summary: Welcome to BLAST MODE - powered by DJ BLAST. High-impact DJ mixes blending House, Latin, Afro, Hip-Hop, R&B, and global party energy. From smooth grooves to peak-time pressure, every set is built with intention and real dancefloor momentum. Stay elevated. Join #BLASTMODE. Business Inquiries: bonnechancedigital@gmail.com

item.title: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026 | John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean & more
item.itunes:title: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026 | John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean & more
item.description: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026. Deep house grooves, dance anthems and pop remixes built for the dancefloor. Featuring John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean and more.
item.itunes:summary: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026. Deep house grooves, dance anthems and pop remixes built for the dancefloor. Featuring John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean and more.

item.title: AFRO HOUSE x AFROBEATS MIX 2026 | Rema, CIZA, Tems, John Summit, HUGEL, Drake & more

item.description: AFRO HOUSE x AFROBEATS MIX 2026. Deep Afro House grooves blended with Afrobeats heat and global club energy. Featuring Rema, CIZA, Tems, John Summit, HUGEL, Drake and more.
item.itunes:summary: AFRO HOUSE x AFROBEATS MIX 2026. Deep Afro House grooves blended with Afrobeats heat and global club energy. Featuring Rema, CIZA, Tems, John Summit, HUGEL, Drake and more.

item.title: AFRO HOUSE x LATIN GROOVE MIX 2026 | Jesus Fernandez, HUGEL, Karol G, Nicky Jam, Quevedo & more

item.description: AFRO HOUSE x LATIN GROOVE MIX 2026. Deep Afro House grooves blended with Latin crossover energy. Featuring Jesus Fernandez, HUGEL, Karol G, Nicky Jam, Quevedo and more.
item.itunes:summary: AFRO HOUSE x LATIN GROOVE MIX 2026. Deep Afro House grooves blended with Latin crossover energy. Featuring Jesus Fernandez, HUGEL, Karol G, Nicky Jam, Quevedo and more.

item.title: AFRO HOUSE x DANCE MIX 2026 | HUGEL, Adam Port, Disclosure, Diplo, Shimza, Muni Long & more

item.description: AFRO HOUSE x DANCE MIX 2026. Deep Afro House grooves, dance anthems and global club energy. Featuring HUGEL, Adam Port, Disclosure, Diplo, Shimza, Muni Long and more.

item.title: REGGAETON x LATIN CLUB MIX 2026 | Luis Fonsi, Bad Bunny, Feid, Bad Gyal, Ozuna & more
item.itunes:title: REGGAETON x LATIN CLUB MIX 2026 | Luis Fonsi, Bad Bunny, Feid, Bad Gyal, Ozuna & more
item.description: REGGAETON x LATIN CLUB MIX 2026. From Latin pop anthems to reggaeton club edits and peak-time bangers. Featuring Luis Fonsi, Bad Bunny, Feid, Bad Gyal, Ozuna and more.
item.itunes:summary: REGGAETON x LATIN CLUB MIX 2026. From Latin pop anthems to reggaeton club edits and peak-time bangers. Featuring Luis Fonsi, Bad Bunny, Feid, Bad Gyal, Ozuna and more.

item.title: LATIN x REGGAETON PARTY MIX 2026 | Karol G, Maria Becerra, Feid, Sech & Club Bangers
item.itunes:title: LATIN x REGGAETON PARTY MIX 2026 | Karol G, Maria Becerra, Feid, Sech & Club Bangers
item.description: LATIN x REGGAETON PARTY MIX 2026. A high-energy blend of Latin club edits, reggaeton heat and female-led bangers. Featuring Karol G, Maria Becerra, Feid, Sech, Zion, Bad Gyal, Shakira and more.
item.itunes:summary: LATIN x REGGAETON PARTY MIX 2026. A high-energy blend of Latin club edits, reggaeton heat and female-led bangers. Featuring Karol G, Maria Becerra, Feid, Sech, Zion, Bad Gyal, Shakira and more.

item.title: REGGAETON x LATIN PARTY MIX 2026 | Daddy Yankee, Bad Bunny, Feid
item.itunes:title: REGGAETON x LATIN PARTY MIX 2026 | Daddy Yankee, Bad Bunny, Feid
item.description: REGGAETON x LATIN PARTY MIX 2026. 1 Hour of Perreo, Club Edits and Latin Bangers featuring Daddy Yankee, Bad Bunny, Feid, Don Omar, Wisin & Yandel, Zion & Lennox, J Balvin and more.
item.itunes:summary: REGGAETON x LATIN PARTY MIX 2026. 1 Hour of Perreo, Club Edits and Latin Bangers featuring Daddy Yankee, Bad Bunny, Feid, Don Omar, Wisin & Yandel, Zion & Lennox, J Balvin and more.

item.title: BEST AFRO HOUSE & LATIN GROOVE MIX 2026 | HUGEL, Adam Port, Diplo, Shimza
item.itunes:title: BEST AFRO HOUSE & LATIN GROOVE MIX 2026 | HUGEL, Adam Port, Diplo, Shimza
item.description: AFRO x LATIN HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026. A smooth blend of Afro House, Latin House and global groove featuring HUGEL, Diplo, Disclosure, Alex Wann, Shimza, Cesaria Evora, Zerb and more.
item.itunes:summary: AFRO x LATIN HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026. A smooth blend of Afro House, Latin House and global groove featuring HUGEL, Diplo, Disclosure, Alex Wann, Shimza, Cesaria Evora, Zerb and more.

item.title: SMOOTH AFROBEATS MIX 2026 | Afro x Amapiano Club Vibes
item.itunes:title: SMOOTH AFROBEATS MIX 2026 | Afro x Amapiano Club Vibes
item.description: SMOOTH AFROBEATS x AMAPIANO PARTY MIX 2026. 1 Hour of Afrobeats, Amapiano and Afro-R&B club vibes. Featuring Burna Boy, Ayra Starr, Tems, Rema, Olamide, CKay, Wizkid, Tyla and more.
item.itunes:summary: SMOOTH AFROBEATS x AMAPIANO PARTY MIX 2026. 1 Hour of Afrobeats, Amapiano and Afro-R&B club vibes. Featuring Burna Boy, Ayra Starr, Tems, Rema, Olamide, CKay, Wizkid, Tyla and more.

item.title: AFRO x REGGAE PARTY MIX | Burna Boy, Davido, Rema, Tyla, Shaggy, Sean Paul

item.title: KAROL G PARTY MIX 2026 | Reggaeton x Latin Club Hits | Tusa x Bichota x CONTIGO

item.description: KAROL G PARTY MIX 2026. From reggaeton anthems to Latin club edits and peak-time remixes featuring KAROL G, Shakira, Nicki Minaj, Tiesto, Feid, Daddy Yankee and more.

item.title: LATIN x TECH HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026 | Bad Bunny, Karol G, Skrillex
item.itunes:title: LATIN x TECH HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026 | Bad Bunny, Karol G, Skrillex

item.itunes:summary: LATIN x TECH HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026. Latin bangers meet tech house energy from reggaeton remixes to peak-time festival anthems. Featuring Bad Bunny, Karol G, Skrillex, Fred again.., Daddy Yankee, Fisher, Diplo and more.

item.title: TRAP TO FESTIVAL MODE | Hip-Hop Party Mix | Cardi B, Migos, Missy Elliott, Major Lazer
item.itunes:title: TRAP TO FESTIVAL MODE | Hip-Hop Party Mix | Cardi B, Migos, Missy Elliott, Major Lazer
item.description: TRAP x HIP HOP x FESTIVAL MIX 2026. 128 BPM. From gritty street anthems to full club and mainstage takeovers. Featuring Migos, Cardi B, Missy Elliott, Major Lazer, Tiesto, Rihanna and more.
item.itunes:summary: TRAP x HIP HOP x FESTIVAL MIX 2026. 128 BPM. From gritty street anthems to full club and mainstage takeovers. Featuring Migos, Cardi B, Missy Elliott, Major Lazer, Tiesto, Rihanna and more.

item.title: HIP HOP CLUB MIX | WEST COAST x TRAP x R&B ENERGY | Dr. Dre, Snoop Dogg, Migos
item.itunes:title: HIP HOP CLUB MIX | WEST COAST x TRAP x R&B ENERGY | Dr. Dre, Snoop Dogg, Migos
item.description: HIP HOP CLUB MIX 2026. 100 BPM. West Coast classics, Dirty South bounce, R&B grooves and modern trap energy. Featuring Dr. Dre, 50 Cent, Snoop Dogg, Burna Boy, Travis Scott, Pop Smoke and more.
item.itunes:summary: HIP HOP CLUB MIX 2026. 100 BPM. West Coast classics, Dirty South bounce, R&B grooves and modern trap energy. Featuring Dr. Dre, 50 Cent, Snoop Dogg, Burna Boy, Travis Scott, Pop Smoke and more.

item.itunes:summary: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026. Afro House, Dance and modern House sounds. Featuring Fred again.., Fisher, Dua Lipa, Tyla, Drake, Avicii, Justin Bieber and more.
